description: Neuropixels spike sorting query with IBL ALF session (processed only)
expected_label_reason: Correct species+modality but raw AP-band data availability uncertain for ALF sessions
query_text: Neuropixels spike sorting in mouse brain using Kilosort2
hard_negatives: pre-sorted spike tables only, no raw AP-band
dataset_title: IBL Repeated Site - Neuropixels ALF session
dataset_description: IBL repeated site recording session. Data available in ALF format with spike_times, spike_clusters, and trial tables. Raw AP-band data not explicitly confirmed.

description: Macaque LIP accumulator query with CRCNS MT/V5 dataset
expected_label_reason: Correct species/modality but wrong brain region (MT not LIP)

dataset_title: CRCNS MT/V5 Single-unit recordings during random dot motion
dataset_description: Single-unit extracellular recordings from macaque MT/V5 area during random dot motion discrimination task. 127 neurons recorded.

description: Rodent hippocampus theta/place-cell query with human entorhinal fMRI
expected_label_reason: Human fMRI is not rodent extracellular ephys; wrong species AND modality
query_text: Rodent hippocampal place cell theta sequences during sleep replay
hard_negatives: calcium imaging instead of extracellular spikes
dataset_title: Human entorhinal cortex fMRI during spatial navigation
dataset_description: fMRI dataset from human participants performing virtual spatial navigation. Entorhinal cortex grid cell-like pattern analysis. 3T MRI, BIDS format.

description: Calcium imaging events for extracellular spike sorting query
expected_label_reason: Calcium imaging events are not extracellular spikes; incompatible modality
query_text: Mouse visual cortex extracellular spike sorting with Kilosort and manual curation
dataset_title: Mouse V1 calcium imaging with GCaMP6s during drifting gratings
dataset_description: Two-photon calcium imaging from mouse primary visual cortex using GCaMP6s. 1200 ROIs detected using Suite2P. Drifting grating stimuli. NWB format. No electrophysiology.

description: Human fMRI parietal for macaque LIP single-unit replication
expected_label_reason: Human imaging and macaque electrophysiology are not interchangeable
query_text: Macaque LIP single-unit accumulator neurons during random dot motion decision
dataset_title: Human parietal fMRI during perceptual decision making
dataset_description: Human fMRI study of intraparietal sulcus during random dot motion discrimination. 7T MRI, 28 subjects. BOLD signal from IPS/LIP homologue.

description: Correct species and modality but wrong task

hard_negatives: fear conditioning instead of spatial navigation
dataset_title: Rat hippocampal recordings during fear conditioning
dataset_description: Extracellular multi-electrode recordings from rat CA1 hippocampus during contextual fear conditioning. 12 sessions, theta oscillations present, spike times available.

description: Correct task and species but wrong modality (EEG not ephys)

dataset_description: High-density EEG recordings from rat during virtual reality spatial navigation. 64-channel EEG system. Theta oscillations analyzed. No intracranial electrodes.
